debug_info.goal:
⊢ {n |
      1 < n ∧
        ∀ (deck : Fin n → ℕ),
          (∀ (i : Fin n), 0 < deck i) →
            (Pairwise fun j k => ∃ S, S.Nonempty ∧ (↑(deck j) + ↑(deck k)) / 2 = (∏ i ∈ S, ↑(deck i)) ^ (1 / ↑S.card)) →
              ∀ (i j : Fin n), deck i = deck j} =
    IMO2020P5.answer

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
ext n
  refine ⟨fun h ↦ h.1, fun h ↦ ⟨h, ?_⟩⟩
  intro deck h_pos h_am_gm
  by_contra! h_neq
  obtain ⟨i, j, h_ij⟩ := h_neq
  let v (p : ℕ) (m : ℕ) : ℚ := padicValNat p m
  have h_val : ∀ (p : ℕ) [hp : Fact p.Prime], ∀ i j, v p (deck i) = v p (deck j) := by
    intro p hp
    let x i := v p (deck i)
    have h_p_am_gm : Pairwise fun j k ↦ ∃ S : Finset (Fin n), S.Nonempty ∧
        v p (deck j + deck k) - v p 2 = (∑ l ∈ S, x l) / (#S : ℚ) := by
      intro j k hjk
      obtain ⟨S, hS_ne, hS_eq⟩ := h_am_gm j k hjk
      use S, hS_ne
      have : v p (deck j + deck k) - v p 2 = v p ((deck j + deck k : ℚ) / 2) := by
        simp [v, padicValNat, padicValRat]
        sorry
      sorry
    sorry
  have : ∀ i j, deck i = deck j := by
    intro i j
    apply Nat.ext_iff_prime_padicValNat.mp
    intro p hp
    exact h_val p i j
  exact h_ij (this i j)
